title: Orders search
description: The Orders page searches orders via GET /api/orders. It fires a request on every keystroke (no debounce) and a slow earlier response can overwrite a newer one. Fix it without changing the API contract or adding runtime dependencies. Full bug + Definition of Done live in JIRA-0410 (jira MCP).
acceptance: Debounce input so rapid keystrokes produce one request for the final query.
A stale (slower, older) response must never overwrite a newer one.
Surface idle, loading, results, empty, and error states.
Do not change the GET /api/orders contract.
